div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Verifies JWT on every
authenticated request [HTTPS/JWKS]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Initiates/verifies payments,
disburses payouts & refunds,
provisions reserved accounts [HTTPS]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Payment / refund / reserved-
account webhooks [HTTPS, HMAC]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Host (Creator)
[Person]
Runs a business on Bookmi: lists
services, manages bookings, gets paid
out. Authenticates with an account.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Customer (Audience)
[Person]
Books/pays a host's services from a
public storefront link. Never creates
an account.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bookmi
[Software System]
Lets hosts sell bookable services and
tips via a public storefront, and
manages payments, wallet balance,
and payouts.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Supabase Auth
[External System]
Issues JWTs for host signup/login
(email + OTP, OAuth). Customers
never authenticate.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Monnify
[External System]
Nigerian PSP: checkout (card/bank/
USSD), disbursements (payouts/
refunds), reserved virtual accounts.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SMTP Provider
[External System]
Delivers transactional email:
confirmations, payment links, OTP,
password reset.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cloudinary
[External System]
Client-side image hosting for
host avatars.
